'''Systems Army Alpha''' consisted of 294,912 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and was commanded by [[High Jedi General/Legends|High Jedi General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. One of its two [[Sector Army/Legends|Sectors Armies]] was the [[Second Army|2nd Sector Army]], commanded by [[Senior Jedi General]] [[Ry-Gaul]], which contained [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura's]] [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]].<ref name="Insider 84" />

==Subordinate units==
*Two [[Sector Army/Legends|Sector Armies]]<ref name="Insider 84" />
**[[Second Army|2nd Sector Army]]<ref name="Insider 84" />
